title: health_ping_returns_service_info
description: GET /api/ping without authentication. Expected: 200 OK with JSON body containing 'service', 'version', 'environment', and 'timestamp' fields. Verify 'service' equals 'TukiFact API' (exact string) and 'version' is a non-empty string.

title: health_check_all_dependencies
description: GET /health without authentication. Expected: 200 OK with JSON body containing 'status' field equal to 'Healthy' and 'checks' array with 3 entries. The check names are lowercase strings: 'postgresql', 'nats', 'minio'. Each check object has 'name' (string), 'status' (string equal to 'Healthy'), 'duration' (number), and 'tags' (array). Verify all 3 checks have status 'Healthy'.

title: register_new_tenant_and_admin
description: POST /v1/auth/register without authentication. Send JSON body: {"ruc":"20777111881","razonSocial":"New Backend Co SAC","adminEmail":"newbe@test.pe","adminPassword":"BackendTest2026!","adminFullName":"Backend Tester"}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'accessToken', 'refreshToken', and 'user' object with 'email' matching 'newbe@test.pe' and 'role' equal to 'admin'.

title: register_duplicate_ruc_returns_409
description: POST /v1/auth/register without authentication. Send JSON body: {"ruc":"20100070970","razonSocial":"Duplicate RUC","adminEmail":"duptest@test.pe","adminPassword":"Dup2026!","adminFullName":"Dup"}. This RUC 20100070970 already exists in the database (it was the original tenant RUC). Expected: 409 Conflict.

title: login_valid_credentials
description: POST /v1/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"admin@tukitest.pe","password":"TestSprite2026!","tenantId":"0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84"}. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'accessToken' (non-empty string), 'refreshToken' (non-empty string), and 'user' object where 'email' equals 'admin@tukitest.pe' and 'role' equals 'admin'. Save the accessToken and refreshToken for subsequent tests.

title: login_wrong_password_returns_401
description: POST /v1/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"admin@tukitest.pe","password":"wrongpassword","tenantId":"0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84"}. Expected: 401 Unauthorized.

title: refresh_token_returns_new_tokens
description: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"admin@tukitest.pe","password":"TestSprite2026!","tenantId":"0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84"} to obtain refreshToken. Then POST /v1/auth/refresh with {"refreshToken":"{refreshToken_from_login}"}. Expected: 200 OK with new 'accessToken' and 'refreshToken'. Use the new accessToken for remaining tests.

title: auth_me_returns_user_info
description: GET /v1/auth/me with Authorization Bearer token obtained from login. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing non-null 'userId', 'tenantId' equal to '0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84', 'email' equal to 'admin@tukitest.pe', and 'role' equal to 'admin'.

title: auth_me_no_token_returns_401
description: GET /v1/auth/me WITHOUT any Authorization header. Expected: 401 Unauthorized.

title: emit_factura_with_multiple_items
description: POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Cliente Test SAC","items":[{"description":"Servicio A","quantity":2,"unitPrice":50.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"},{"description":"Producto B","quantity":1,"unitPrice":100.00,"unitMeasure":"NIU","igvType":"10"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'id' (UUID), 'fullNumber' starting with 'F001-', 'total' equal to 236.0 (100+100+36 IGV), 'status', and 'items' array with 2 elements. Save the document 'id' for TC013, TC014, TC015, TC016.

title: emit_document_missing_fields_returns_400
description: POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send incomplete JSON body: {"documentType":"01"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request because required fields serie, customerDocType, customerDocNumber, customerName, and items are missing.

title: list_documents_with_pagination_and_filter
description: GET /v1/documents?page=1&pageSize=5&documentType=01 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'data' array (max 5 items, all should have documentType '01') and 'pagination' object with 'page', 'pageSize', 'totalCount', 'totalPages' fields. Then GET /v1/documents?page=999&pageSize=5 and verify 'data' is an empty array.

title: get_document_detail_and_downloads
description: Using the document ID saved from TC010: GET /v1/documents/{id} with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'fullNumber', 'items' array with 2 elements, 'total', 'status'. Then GET /v1/documents/{id}/pdf with Bearer token, expected: 200 OK with binary content. Then GET /v1/documents/{id}/xml with Bearer token, expected: 200 OK with content.

title: emit_credit_note_against_factura
description: Using the document ID saved from TC010: POST /v1/documents/credit-note with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"serie":"FC01","referenceDocumentId":"{documentId_from_TC010}","creditNoteReason":"01","description":"Anulacion de operacion","currency":"PEN","items":[{"description":"Servicio A","quantity":2,"unitPrice":50.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'fullNumber' starting with 'FC01-'.

title: get_document_404_for_nonexistent_id
description: GET /v1/documents/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 with Bearer token. Expected: 404 Not Found.

title: void_document_and_prevent_double_void
description: First emit a new document: POST /v1/documents with Bearer token and body {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Para Anular","items":[{"description":"Item","quantity":1,"unitPrice":10.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"}]}. Save the new document ID. Then POST /v1/voided-documents with Bearer token and body {"documentId":"{newDocId}","voidReason":"Error en emision"}. Expected: 201 Created with 'ticketNumber'. Then try voiding the SAME document again with same body. Expected: 400 Bad Request (already voided).

title: list_voided_documents
description: GET /v1/voided-documents with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array. Each element should have 'ticketNumber', 'status', and 'createdAt' fields.

title: series_list_create_deactivate
description: GET /v1/series with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of series. Then POST /v1/series with body {"documentType":"01","serie":"FZ99","emissionPoint":"0001"}. Expected: 201 Created with 'id' and 'serie' equal to 'FZ99'. Save the series ID. Then PUT /v1/series/{id} with body {"isActive":false}. Expected: 204 No Content. Then POST /v1/series with body {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","emissionPoint":"0001"} to test duplicate (F001 already exists). Expected: 409 Conflict.

title: users_crud_and_role_validation
description: GET /v1/users with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array. Then POST /v1/users with body {"email":"testcrud@test.pe","password":"Crud2026!","fullName":"CRUD User","role":"emisor"}. Expected: 201 Created. Save user ID. Then PUT /v1/users/{id} with body {"role":"consulta"}. Expected: 204. Then DELETE /v1/users/{id}. Expected: 204. Then POST /v1/users with body {"email":"bad@test.pe","password":"B2026!","fullName":"Bad","role":"superadmin"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request (invalid role).

title: emisor_role_cannot_access_admin_endpoints
description: First create an emisor user: POST /v1/users with admin Bearer token and body {"email":"emisortest@test.pe","password":"Emisor2026!","fullName":"Emisor","role":"emisor"}. Then login as emisor: POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"emisortest@test.pe","password":"Emisor2026!","tenantId":"0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84"}. Using the emisor token: GET /v1/users should return 403 Forbidden. POST /v1/series with body {"documentType":"01","serie":"FXXX","emissionPoint":"0001"} should return 403 Forbidden. But POST /v1/documents with valid invoice body should return 201 Created (emisor CAN emit docs).

title: api_keys_create_and_revoke
description: GET /v1/api-keys with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array. Then POST /v1/api-keys with body {"name":"TestKey","permissions":["emit","query"]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'id', 'prefix', and 'plainTextKey' (non-empty string, shown only once). Save the key ID. Then DELETE /v1/api-keys/{id}. Expected: 204 No Content.

title: webhooks_full_lifecycle
description: GET /v1/webhooks with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK. Then POST /v1/webhooks with body {"url":"https://httpbin.org/post","events":["document.created","document.accepted"],"maxRetries":3}. Expected: 201 Created with 'id' and 'secret' fields. Save webhook ID. Then PUT /v1/webhooks/{id} with body {"isActive":false}. Expected: 204. Then GET /v1/webhooks/{id}/deliveries. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array. Then DELETE /v1/webhooks/{id}. Expected: 204.

title: tenant_get_update_and_environment
description: GET /v1/tenant with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'ruc' equal to '20100070970'. Then PUT /v1/tenant with body {"nombreComercial":"TestSprite Updated","direccion":"Av TestSprite 999"}. Expected: 204. Then PUT /v1/tenant/environment with body {"environment":"beta"}. Expected: 200 OK with 'environment' equal to 'beta'. Then PUT /v1/tenant/environment with body {"environment":"staging"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request (invalid environment value).

title: plans_list_public
description: GET /v1/plans without authentication. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of plan objects. Each plan should have 'name' and 'features' fields. Verify at least 1 plan exists.

title: audit_log_with_pagination_and_filter
description: GET /v1/audit-log?page=1&pageSize=10 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'data' array and 'pagination' object with 'totalCount' greater than 0. Then GET /v1/audit-log?entityType=Documents&page=1&pageSize=5. Expected: 200 OK with filtered results.

title: dashboard_returns_kpis
description: GET /v1/dashboard with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'today' object (with 'totalAmount' and 'totalDocuments'), 'thisMonth' object, 'byType' array, 'byStatus' array, and 'monthlySales' array.
